description: Michaels Cue Bids and Unusual 2NT: compete over opponent's suit opening with two-suited hands (5-5+)
purpose: Show a two-suited hand (5-5 or better) when an opponent opens a suit, enabling partner to choose the best fit at a competitive level

authority.label: Bridge Guys — comprehensive Michaels coverage with advancer responses and continuations

teaching.tradeoff: Michaels/Unusual 2NT sacrifices the natural meaning of the cue bid and 2NT in exchange for immediately showing a two-suited competitive hand.
teaching.principle: Against a suit opening, showing two suits at once lets partner judge fit quickly. The specific cue bid varies by opening suit to encode which suits you hold.
commonMistakes: A cue bid of opponent's minor shows BOTH MAJORS, not a strong hand — don't confuse with a Western Cue Bid
After Michaels over a major, 2NT asks partner to show the minor — it's a relay, not a natural bid
You need 5-5 shape (or better) — 5-4 is not enough for Michaels

explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Does not hold 5+ cards in both majors
Does not hold 5+ cards in both minors
Does not hold 5+ spades with a 5+ minor
Does not hold 5+ hearts with a 5+ minor
The minor suit is not clubs
The minor suit is not diamonds
Fewer than 3 hearts to support partner
Fewer than 3 spades to support partner
Fewer than 3 clubs to support partner
Fewer than 3 diamonds to support partner

explanationEntries.displayText: Pass: No preference for either major
2NT: Ask partner to show the minor
3C: Pass-or-correct — escape to partner's minor (over 1H Michaels)
2NT: Ask partner to show the minor (over 1S Michaels)
3C: Pass-or-correct — escape to partner's minor (over 1S Michaels)

teachingLabel.name: Opponent's 1C
teachingLabel.summary: Opponent opens 1C, triggering the Michaels/Unusual 2NT convention

teachingLabel.name: Opponent's 1D
teachingLabel.summary: Opponent opens 1D, triggering the Michaels/Unusual 2NT convention

teachingLabel.name: Opponent's 1H
teachingLabel.summary: Opponent opens 1H, triggering the Michaels/Unusual 2NT convention

teachingLabel.name: Opponent's 1S
teachingLabel.summary: Opponent opens 1S, triggering the Michaels/Unusual 2NT convention

teachingLabel.name: 2C — both majors over 1C
teachingLabel.summary: Cue bid opponent's 1C to show 5-5 or better in both majors

teachingLabel.name: 2NT — both minors over 1C
teachingLabel.summary: Unusual 2NT to show 5-5 or better in both minors

teachingLabel.name: Pass (no action over 1C)
teachingLabel.summary: Decline to compete — hand does not meet Michaels/Unusual 2NT requirements

teachingLabel.name: 2D — both majors over 1D
teachingLabel.summary: Cue bid opponent's 1D to show 5-5 or better in both majors

teachingLabel.name: 2NT — both minors over 1D
teachingLabel.summary: Unusual 2NT to show 5-5 or better in both minors

teachingLabel.name: Pass (no action over 1D)
teachingLabel.summary: Decline to compete — hand does not meet Michaels/Unusual 2NT requirements

teachingLabel.name: 2H — spades + a minor over 1H
teachingLabel.summary: Cue bid opponent's 1H to show 5+ spades and 5+ in an unspecified minor

teachingLabel.name: 2NT — both minors over 1H
teachingLabel.summary: Unusual 2NT to show 5-5 or better in both minors

teachingLabel.name: Pass (no action over 1H)
teachingLabel.summary: Decline to compete — hand does not meet Michaels/Unusual 2NT requirements

teachingLabel.name: 2S — hearts + a minor over 1S
teachingLabel.summary: Cue bid opponent's 1S to show 5+ hearts and 5+ in an unspecified minor

teachingLabel.name: 2NT — both minors over 1S
teachingLabel.summary: Unusual 2NT to show 5-5 or better in both minors

teachingLabel.name: Pass (no action over 1S)
teachingLabel.summary: Decline to compete — hand does not meet Michaels/Unusual 2NT requirements

teachingLabel.name: 2H — prefer hearts (weak)
teachingLabel.summary: Choose hearts as trump with a weak hand and 3+ heart support

teachingLabel.name: 2S — prefer spades (weak)
teachingLabel.summary: Choose spades as trump with a weak hand and 3+ spade support

teachingLabel.name: 3H — invitational hearts
teachingLabel.summary: Invite game in hearts with 8-9 HCP and 3+ heart support

teachingLabel.name: 3S — invitational spades
teachingLabel.summary: Invite game in spades with 8-9 HCP and 3+ spade support

teachingLabel.name: 4H — game in hearts
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game in hearts with 10+ HCP and 3+ heart support

teachingLabel.name: 4S — game in spades
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game in spades with 10+ HCP and 3+ spade support

teachingLabel.name: Pass (no major preference)
teachingLabel.summary: Pass with a weak hand and no clear preference between the majors

teachingLabel.name: 2S — accept spades (weak)
teachingLabel.summary: Accept the known spade suit with a weak hand

teachingLabel.name: 2NT — ask for minor
teachingLabel.summary: Relay bid asking partner to reveal the unknown minor suit

teachingLabel.name: 3S — invitational spades
teachingLabel.summary: Invite game in spades with 8-9 HCP and 3+ spade support

teachingLabel.name: 4S — game in spades
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game in spades with 10+ HCP and 3+ spade support

teachingLabel.name: 3C — pass-or-correct
teachingLabel.summary: Bid 3C asking partner to pass with clubs or correct to 3D with diamonds — escape to the minor with no spade fit

teachingLabel.name: Pass (decline Michaels over 1H)
teachingLabel.summary: Pass with a weak hand — no fit for spades and no interest in the minor

teachingLabel.name: 3H — accept hearts (weak)
teachingLabel.summary: Accept the known heart suit with a weak hand (3H needed since 2S was the cue bid)

teachingLabel.name: 2NT — ask for minor
teachingLabel.summary: Relay bid asking partner to reveal the unknown minor suit

teachingLabel.name: 3H — invitational hearts
teachingLabel.summary: Invite game in hearts with 8-9 HCP and 3+ heart support

teachingLabel.name: 4H — game in hearts
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game in hearts with 10+ HCP and 3+ heart support

teachingLabel.name: 3C — pass-or-correct
teachingLabel.summary: Bid 3C asking partner to pass with clubs or correct to 3D with diamonds — escape to the minor with no heart fit

teachingLabel.name: Pass (decline Michaels over 1S)
teachingLabel.summary: Pass with a weak hand — no fit for hearts and no interest in the minor

teachingLabel.name: 3C — prefer clubs
teachingLabel.summary: Choose clubs as trump after partner's Unusual 2NT

teachingLabel.name: 3D — prefer diamonds
teachingLabel.summary: Choose diamonds as trump after partner's Unusual 2NT

teachingLabel.name: 5C — game in clubs
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game in clubs with 10+ HCP and 3+ club support

teachingLabel.name: 5D — game in diamonds
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game in diamonds with 10+ HCP and 3+ diamond support

teachingLabel.name: Pass (decline Unusual 2NT)
teachingLabel.summary: Pass with a weak hand and no clear minor preference

teachingLabel.name: 3C — minor is clubs
teachingLabel.summary: Reveal the unknown minor as clubs in response to partner's 2NT relay

teachingLabel.name: 3D — minor is diamonds
teachingLabel.summary: Reveal the unknown minor as diamonds in response to partner's 2NT relay

definitions.description: The minor suit is clubs (clubs >= diamonds)
The minor suit is diamonds (diamonds > clubs)
